Template for filing bug reports with required fields and labels for issue tracking.

# Purpose
This metadata file defines a template for submitting bug reports in a software project. It specifies the structure and fields required for users to report issues effectively. The template includes checkboxes to confirm if the user has searched for existing issues, and text areas for detailing the current behavior, expected behavior, steps to reproduce the issue, and the environment in which the issue occurs. Each section has specific attributes and validations to ensure that users provide necessary and concise information. The environment section allows users to specify details like the operating system and device, and it supports markdown rendering for better formatting.
